title: Basil Infused Mexican Chilies Stir-fry
description: An earthy and tender vegetarian-friendly dish featuring basil-infused chilies, seasoned with spices for an adventurous taste of Mexico. Enjoy it as a vibrant appetizer or light meal.
instructions: Wash and finely chop the jalapeno peppers.
Finely chop the onion, and crush the garlic cloves.
In a large bowl, mix the chopped jalapenos with salt and grind them lightly into a paste.
Sauté finely chopped onions in oil until translucent. Add crushed garlic and cook for another minute.
Stir in tomato paste and let it simmer for 2 minutes, stirring constantly to prevent sticking.
Fold in the basil leaves (chopped), mix well, then add the ground cumin, coriander seeds, and cayenne pepper powder. Mix well.
Slowly pour in lime juice while stirring continuously until everything is nicely combined with a thick consistency.
Transfer to an air fryer basket for 10-15 minutes at 230°C or until golden brown on all sides.
